name: Sigil
description: Wax seals pressed onto parchment — crimson blobs with an embossed ring, each one stamped a little differently per redraw.

code.style: --waxc: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: @rand(12%, 20%); border-radius: @rand(38%, 56%) @rand(38%, 56%) @rand(38%, 56%) @rand(38%, 56%); background: var(--waxc); box-shadow: inset calc(-12px / @Y) calc(-14px / @Y) 0 rgba(40, 16, 16, 0.25), inset calc(10px / @Y) calc(12px / @Y) 0 rgba(255, 235, 210, 0.22); transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 34%; border: calc(26px / @Y) solid rgba(50, 20, 18, 0.3); border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; transform: scale(@rand(0.85, 1.1)); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
